title: Using pesticides - Canada.ca
content:
Information on pesticides and their use at home, at work and for agriculture. Also get pest control tips.

## Services and information
Learn about pesticide safety, including insect repellents, homemade pesticides, pesticide spray drift, lawn pesticides and food safety.
Information on how to deal with common household pests like spiders, bedbugs, ants, cockroaches and mice.

### Using pesticides at home
Learn how pesticides are approved and regulated in Canada. Also find out how to reduce pesticide use at home.

### Using pesticides at work
Information for pest control professionals, including importation standards, a pesticide label database and how to report a problem.

### Using pesticides for agriculture
Learn about agricultural pesticide programs, including the Grower Requested Own Use Program, Sustainable Pest Management Program and Minor Use Program.
